title: Kapitel 14 - Formular-Inputs im Ãœberblick Check
description: Wissenscheck:  Alle Input-Typen: text, email, password, checkbox, radio, textarea, select.

questions.prompt: Which input type is best for collecting an email address?

explanations.overview: Use type="email" to get built-in email validation behavior in browsers.

byOptionId.email: Correct - type="email" is intended for email addresses.
byOptionId.text: Incorrect - text works but does not provide email-specific validation.
byOptionId.password: Incorrect - password is for hidden secret input.
byOptionId.tel: Incorrect - tel is for phone numbers, not email addresses.

questions.prompt: When should you use radio buttons?

options.label: When users can choose many options
When users must choose exactly one option from a set
When users need to type long text

explanations.overview: Radio buttons represent a single-select choice among related options.

byOptionId.single: Correct - radios are used for one choice in a group.
byOptionId.multi: Incorrect - checkboxes are used for selecting multiple options.
byOptionId.longtext: Incorrect - long text is typically entered with a textarea.
byOptionId.file: Incorrect - file uploads use input type="file".
